name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Lenexa Check Into Cash at 13314 W 87th St Pkwy, KS — quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
This Check Into Cash location sits at 13314 W 87th St Pkwy in Lenexa, KS, in a standalone facility designed for quick transactions. Open Monday–Friday with extended hours (10am–7pm Mon & Fri; 10am–6pm Tue–Thu) and Saturday 10am–4pm, the storefront is positioned to serve Lenexa's working population on weekday evenings and weekend mornings.

At this Lenexa branch, Check Into Cash offers payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit solutions tailored to immediate cash needs. For more information or to discuss your specific situation, call +1 913-307-0898 during business hours. The staff handles applications efficiently, serving Lenexa-area residents and those in the surrounding Kansas region.

Lenexa residents needing same-day or quick cash should bring valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and an active checking account when visiting the W 87th St location. Check Into Cash provides transparent, straightforward lending without the complexity of traditional banks.
pros: 30 years in operation — one of the longest-tenured short-term lenders in the US
Same-day cash disbursement in-store for approved borrowers
Multiple loan products: payday, title, installment, and flex line of credit
Ancillary financial services in one location: check cashing, Western Union, bill pay, tax prep
State-licensed with public retail fee schedule posted at Michigan locations
Extended weekday hours (open until 7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability
Payday loans available both in-store and online in eligible states
cons: Payday loans capped at $600 in Michigan — insufficient for expenses above that threshold
High-cost product — payday loans carry very high APRs not disclosed in the scraped content
Active checking account required for loan applications, excluding fully unbanked consumers
Product availability varies significantly by state — not all services offered at every location
Closed Sundays at this location, limiting access for weekend emergencies
best_for: Consumers needing $600 or less before their next payday with no cheaper credit options available
Borrowers who prefer in-person transactions and need cash in hand the same day
Individuals who need multiple financial services in one visit (loan + check cashing + bill pay)
Consumers in states where Check Into Cash operates who are locked out of traditional bank credit
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for consumers who need a small emergency loan of $600 or less, have an active checking account, and need cash in hand today from a physical location. The main caveat is cost — payday loans are among the most expensive credit products available, and should only be used when the borrower can repay in full on their next pay date and has exhausted lower-cost alternatives.
services: Online loan applications (availability varies by state)
meta_description: Check Into Cash at 13314 W 87th St Pkwy, Lenexa, KS. Quick payday & title loans. Open Mon–Sat, extended weekday hours.
